description_long: This billiard table features a rectangular playing surface covered in green felt, surrounded by black rails with white corner caps. The table is equipped with six visible pockets, one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side, all open for ball entry. Several colored billiard balls and a cue stick are arranged on the surface, indicating the table is set up for play. The legs are arched and metallic, with a modern, structural design that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The rail cushions are black and appear to be made of rubber, providing bounce for the balls. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood, metal, and synthetic materials, typical for urban recreational or club environments.
description: A modern billiard table with a green felt surface, black rails, and arched metallic legs, set up with balls and a cue stick. The table features six open pockets and a sturdy, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the table, green felt surface, balls, cue stick, and two arched legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the table's width, pocket placement, and the cue stick extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite side of the table, balls, and arched legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pocket arrangement and the cue stick positioned on the table.
attribute_pocket_openings: Six open pockets, one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side; pockets are rounded and appear to be of standard size, with no covers.
attribute_rail_cushions: Black rubber rail cushions with a smooth, slightly rounded profile; no visible markings or branding; appear to be in good condition with a modern, minimalistic style.
attribute_leg_design: Two pairs of arched metallic legs, each pair connected by a horizontal support; legs are sleek, modern, and provide a stable base with no decorative elements.
attribute_felt_covering: Green felt covering, smooth and even in texture, appears to be in good condition with no visible seams, wear, or branding; standard appearance.
